Hint Fleet Code: Optional, but it is best to use a short unique code for the fleet.

Hint Fleet Description: Add a short description explaining the fleet purpose or operating scope.
Hint Fleet Email: Optional, but use a valid email for operational communication.
Hint Fleet Image: Optional fleet identity image used in profile and management views.
Hint Fleet Location: Enter the general location, city, or main operating area of the fleet.
Hint Fleet Name: Enter a clear and recognizable fleet name as it should appear to users.
Hint Fleet Tax Number: Enter the VAT/Tax registration number if available.
